'''Raxus II''',<ref name="TEA" /> or '''Raxus Two''',<ref name="Mission" /> was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located within the [[Raxus system/Legends|Raxus system]],<ref name="TEA" /> a part of the [[Tion Hegemony/Legends|Tion Hegemony's]]<ref name="EAOC" /> [[Back Spiral]] in the [[Tion Cluster/Legends|Tion Cluster]].<ref name="Xim Week" /> It was situated within the historical [[Greater Tion]] region,<ref name="Xim Week" /> in [[The Slice/Legends|the Slice]] portion<ref name="TEA" /> of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="EAOC" /> Raxus II lay on the [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlane]] known as the [[Tion Trade Route]], which connected it to the [[Joxin system|Endregaad]] and [[Tion system/Legends|Tion systems]].<ref name="Xim Week" />

Raxus II was the second planet [[Orbit/Legends|orbiting]] the [[Star/Legends|star]] [[Raxus (star)|Raxus]].<ref name="TEA" /> It was a [[Temperature/Legends|frozen]] world<ref name="Mission" /> covered with [[Water/Legends|ice]].<ref name="TEA" />

During the [[Cold War (Galactic Republic–Sith Empire)|Cold War]], recent studies of relics suggested that Raxus II was once inhabited by the ancient [[Xim's empire|Tionese Empire]].<ref name="Mission" />
